How many 16-year-olds work in the US? \"Mark Swarthout 794,173 Contributions Contract attorney. When not working I teach karate, collect stamps, write books, and play the ukulele. How many 16-year-olds work in the US? Answer . 
 According to the Child Labor Coalition, 26% of the 16-year-olds in the United States are employed at least pa
